$comment: Template for one employment-law gold question. Copy, fill, keep status=draft until an employment lawyer completes expert review (see expert-review-guide.md).

template.category: severance | notice_period | pension | section14 | overtime | vacation | sick_leave | maternity | equal_opportunity | harassment | termination_procedure | employee_vs_contractor | collective | extension_orders
template.law_as_of: YYYY-MM-DD — the date the gold answer is pinned to
template.matter_context: optional synthetic matter context or null
expected_topics: fixture/corpus topic tags used for POC machinery scoring

correct_legal_sources: pinned by the reviewing lawyer — statute sections, judgments (public citations only)
mandatory_authorities: authorities WITHOUT which the answer fails
acceptable_alternative_authorities: substitutes that also support the answer
expected_answer_elements: the propositions a complete answer must contain
common_traps: known wrong answers / outdated rules / confusions
